content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Feb 20, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
The day saw the introduction of a new chatbot widget and several dependency updates. Discussions around inter-agent coordination and enhancements for Twitter and Google MCPs were initiated.
## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
- A new feature, "Vera — Virtually Ever After chatbot widget," has been added to the `vea-chatbot` module in [#6515](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6515).
- Strict typing for the logger runtime has been refactored in the core module in [#6519](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6519).
- Dependency updates across three directories, involving four packages, have been initiated in [#6518](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6518).

## CLOSED ISSUES

### Landing Site Enhancements
- The issue to add a Discord option to the Eliza App landing site has been closed, making Discord available as a fourth messaging option on the main landing site, as discussed in a meeting on Feb 9 [#6487](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6487).

### Beta Launch Metrics
- The task to set up product metrics for tracking usage and engagement ahead of the beta launch has been completed [#6504](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6504).

## NEW ISSUES

### Multi-Agent Coordination
- A new discussion has been opened regarding inter-agent coordination and cross-instance communication patterns within the Eliza framework, exploring how users manage multi-agent scenarios [#6514](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6514).

### MCP Enhancements
- Enhancements for Twitter MCP have been proposed, referencing a pull request in `eliza-cloud-v2` [#6516](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6516).
- Similarly, enhancements for Google MCP have been suggested, also referencing a pull request in `eliza-cloud-v2` [#6517](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6517).

## ACTIVE ISSUES
